_format: Map of CHS index_no (string) to [longitude, latitude] in WGS84. A null value means 'I have verified the PDF coord is correct; stop flagging this station as a CSV-vs-PDF disagreement.' Keys starting with '_' are treated as comments.
_block_pdf_wrong_replaced_with_chs_offic: Stations whose PDF coord was substantially wrong; values pulled from each station's tides.gc.ca page. See notes/tables_processing.md.
_block_pdf_correct_csv_wrong: Stations where the CSV row is wrong but the PDF is right. Marked null so the script doesn't keep flagging them.
